use_cases: Displaying images within a controlled aspect ratio container
Building responsive image layouts in web applications
Creating consistent image containers for media galleries
Wrapping images for lazy loading implementations
Maintaining proportional image sizing across devices
ai_summary: A lightweight media component that wraps Radix UI's AspectRatio primitive for displaying images within constrained proportions. This atomic component provides a foundation for lazy-loaded image implementations, allowing developers to maintain consistent aspect ratios while deferring image loading for improved performance.
